name: @lgr/engine-core
description: LGR WebGL engine core — createEngine() + the city/water/post stack, the day-night SunRig, weather, the pixel/toon style chain, and the viewer control-bar. The shared library every project links.

scripts.build:lib: vite build --config vite.lib.config.js && vite build --config vite.lib.core.config.js && vite build --config vite.lib.hero.config.js
